message:
feat(analytics): add schema v10 — token usage ledger, daily stats, and model pricing

Add comprehensive token analytics infrastructure via MIGRATION_V10 to
enable per-session and per-day cost tracking across all AI coding agents:

token_usage table:
- Per-message token usage ledger linked to messages table via foreign key
- Captures input/output/cache_read/cache_creation/thinking token counts
- Records model identification (name, family, tier, provider, service_tier)
- Tracks message context (role, content_chars, tool_call_count)
- Includes estimated_cost_usd for real-time cost monitoring
- Indexed on day_id+agent_id, conversation_id, model_family+day_id,
  workspace_id+day_id, and timestamp_ms for flexible querying

token_daily_stats table:
- Pre-aggregated daily rollups partitioned by agent, source, and model family
- Maintains running counts for API calls, messages by role, tool calls
- Stores cumulative token totals and estimated cost per partition
- PRIMARY KEY on (day_id, agent_slug, source_id, model_family) for
  efficient upsert aggregation

model_pricing table:
- Lookup table for cost estimation with model_pattern glob matching
- Seeded with current pricing for Claude Opus/Sonnet/Haiku 4.x,
  GPT-4o/4-turbo/4.1, o3, o4-mini, and Gemini 2 Flash/Pro
- Keyed on (model_pattern, effective_date) for historical pricing

conversations table extensions:
- ALTER TABLE adds 11 summary columns: total token counts by type,
  estimated_cost_usd, primary_model, api/tool/user/assistant call counts

Schema version bumped 9 -> 10 with migration wired into all upgrade paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
